title: Universal Tool Ice Tempered S Steel Salon Hairdressing Barber Scissor 4.5 inch
description:
4 1/2" Shears for Hair Stylists, Barbers, beautician, hairdressers, cosmetologists, etc. This is a new pair of shears Great for hair stylists and barbers. The scissors are made from ice-tempered stainless steel Ice tempered steel holds an edge longer than regular stainless steel. There is also a thumb rest for your comfort and convenience. The pair measures approximately 4.5" (114 mm) long.
